zh.lifeSummary: Mary Steele於1652年12月5日出生在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德哈特福德。她於1670年之前與William Tryon在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1688年4月在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Steele于1652年12月5日出生在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。她于1670年之前与William Tryon在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1688年4月在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Steele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English stel(e) ‘steel’, perhaps used for someone considered as hard and durable as steel, or for a foundry worker.
Scottish: habitational name from one or more of the places called Steel(e) or Steill in Ayrshire, Berwickshire, and Dumfriesshire, from Scots steel ‘steep bank, spur of a ridge’.

variants.name: Stile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carlo, Sabato.

English: from Middle English stile, stigel, stighel, stikel, steghel, stekel ‘stile’, also ‘steep ascent’ (Old English stigel, stigol). The surname is usually topographic, for someone who lived by a stile or steep ascent, and occasionally habitational, from a place so named, such as Stile in Castle Sowerby (Cumberland), Steel (Shropshire), and perhaps Steel (Northumberland).

variants.name: Steel
meanings: Americanized form (translation into English) of German Stahl and Swedish Ståhl or Stål, all meaning ‘steel’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: Mary Steele was born on 5 December 1652, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, United States. She married William Tryon before 1670, in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in April 1688, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Steele est née le 5 décembre 1652, à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis. Elle a épousé William Tryon avant 1670, à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1688, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Steele wurde am 5. Dezember 1652 in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren. Sie hat vor 1670 in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America William Tryon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1688 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Steele è nata il il 5 dicembre 1652 nel Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Lei sposato William Tryon prima del 1670, nel Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1688, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Steeleは1652年12月5日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードで生まれた。1670年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードでWilliam Tryonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1688年4月にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Steele(은)는 1652년 12월 5일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1670년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 William Tryon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1688년 4월 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Steele nasceu em 5 de dezembro de 1652, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Ela casou-se com William Tryon antes 1670, em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1688, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Steele родилась 5 декабря 1652 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Tryon перед 1670 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1688 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Steele nació el 5 de diciembre de 1652, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Se casó con William Tryon antes de 1670, en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en abril de 1688, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 35 años.
